summary: Iteration 8 - All 5 critical issues verified and working. 1) Game Detail navigation from Terminal works via Trade buttons. 2) Trades Center KPIs (Total Paper P/L, Total Live P/L, Open Paper Trades, Open Live Trades) all displaying correctly. 3) Portfolio page shows 'Trading Summary (Paper + Live)' table with PAPER, LIVE, and COMBINED rows. 4) Probability Charts render with data on Game Detail page (Market vs Fair, Edge, Volatility tabs). 5) Market Intelligence panel shows (5-min Trend, 30-min Trend, Volatility, Momentum). Manual trade flow tested - trade executed and visible in API.

issues: Minor hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - caused by React rendering wrapper in tables. Does not affect functionality.
Console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render. Charts still render correctly after data loads.

critical_code_review_comments: GameDetail.jsx - loadGame() correctly handles both ESPN game IDs (nba_XXXXXXXX) and Kalshi market tickers
GameDetail.jsx - handleTrade() calls addTrade from Zustand store to sync trades globally (Issue 5 fix verified)
TradesCenter.js - KPI cards using pnlSummary from useTrades hook - all 4 KPIs display correctly
Portfolio.jsx - Paper+Live summary table with getPaperSummary(), getLiveSummary() - PAPER, LIVE, COMBINED rows all present
ProbabilityChart.jsx - Shows placeholder 'No probability data available' when no data, renders chart when data exists
IntelligencePanel.jsx - Shows placeholder 'Collecting market data...' when no intelligence, displays indicators when data present
seed_data_creation: Manual trade created during testing: game nba_401838141, 10 contracts, YES side, filled status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical issues verified working: 1) Terminal page has Trade buttons that navigate to /game/{gameId}. 2) Trades Center at /trades shows 4 KPI cards with data-testid attributes. 3) Portfolio at /portfolio shows 'Trading Summary (Paper + Live)' table with PAPER/LIVE/COMBINED rows. 4) Game Detail page renders Probability Charts with Market vs Fair/Edge/Volatility tabs. 5) Manual trades executed from Game Detail appear in API immediately. Note: All Games page (/all-games) is for Kalshi markets only, shows 'No Markets Found' when filtered to Open status with no open markets available.

mocked_apis.real_data: ESPN game data and Kalshi category data are real
